fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: West Virginia Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to West Virginia - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity west virginia, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to west virginia, speech-language pathologist compact west virginia, west virginia speech-language pathologist endorsement application

board.name: Board of Examiners for Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology
board.parent_dept: West Virginia Board of Examiners for SLP and Audiology

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: Full credential for independent SLP practice in West Virginia.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: For SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Submit with fees to the Board.

telepractice_text: West Virginia permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact. West Virginia is one of the first states actively issuing compact privileges through CompactConnect as of October 2025.
provisional_text: West Virginia issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: West Virginia is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact and is actively issuing compact privileges.

faqs.question: How much does a West Virginia SLP license cost?
Is West Virginia part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
faqs.answer: Yes. West Virginia is one of the first states actively issuing compact privileges.

faqs.question: Does West Virginia allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does West Virginia have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. West Virginia participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in West Virginia without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to West Virginia?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in West Virginia while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: West Virginia is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact and is actively issuing compact privileges.
